training_status: returning to weightlifting after 5 years off; was competitive powerlifter aged 16-25
health_conditions: chronic GI issues (diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, dumping syndrome, esophageal dysfunction)
joint and back pain from intensive training and occupational stress
anxiety disorder secondary to GI symptoms

benefits.description: Completely eliminated severe GI symptoms including diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, dumping syndrome, and esophageal dysfunction within 24 hours
Resolved severe insomnia; transitioned from 4-day sleep deprivation episodes to normal sleep with natural tiredness at bedtime
Altered task perception and mental reward system; reported ability to enjoy mundane tasks and receive endorphin release from completion; described as epiphany-like feeling in frontal lobe
Rapid strength gains during 4-week cycle; bench press improved from 205 max to 225x15 reps; squat improved from 225 to 300+; other compound lifts showed similar rapid progression
Improved workout recovery and tendon/ligament strengthening; enabled return to intense training without pain limitation
Maintained muscle pump throughout day and maintained hardness/vascularity; acne completely healed during cycle

side_effects.description: Reduced stimulant effects; caffeine and Vyvanse effects moved to background processing; no jittery/hyperactive feeling from stimulants
Intramuscular injections in stomach fat did not produce noticeable local effects

protocol_notes: Reconstituted 5mg vial with 3ml bacteriostatic water. Administered orally via 1cc insulin syringe (12.5 units = ~250mcg) into back of mouth and swallowed on empty stomach. Also performed 3 intramuscular injections (2 in stomach fat, 1 in wrist). Concurrent use of 70mg Vyvanse daily, 200mg caffeine daily, and Clonidine (started ~4 months before BPC to manage stimulant comedown). Concurrent intensive exercise program and gardening (8-14 hours daily). Noted that effects may have been enhanced by placebo confidence. Reported using GHRP-6 after BPC cycle with continued improvements.
